content: The power of a god cannot be overcome! Zanzan, this is providence for all the world. Even gods are merely beings restricted to limited power determined by promise that power, although great is not unlimited That voice? Alvis?! How dare you disobey me?! I am Manada I was here at the beginning and will proclaim the end But that's impossible! Choke it is time to choose Does this world belong Zanzan or does it belong to you? That something I decided long ago! We use our power as a god and these are destiny! It's fading from the memory of a gods existence born from the chaos of creation It is
